items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【New Arrivals】
The latest LOU BELT BAG from the boutique, featuring an adjustable waist bag design. Only one size available. Made of 100% calfskin, it has one interior pocket, three card slots, and one zippered exterior pocket! It is not just a waist bag; it can also be worn as a chest bag or crossbody. Easily fits an iPhone Plus! Very practical and convenient!
Model: 534817.jd
Dimensions: 17x12.5x5.5cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Is YSL now pursuing a dual approach? Not only have they launched a super huge tote bag, but also a cute mini round bag to meet the needs of different people! The new SADE mini round tube handbag may be small, but it is not a useless little bag. Tested to easily hold a mobile phone and daily small items. Stylish and practical! The entire bag features a diamond quilting pattern paired with the classic YSL mini logo. It is incredibly exquisite! Made of original lambskin leather with a soft and comfortable texture, paired with a short shoulder strap, it is cute beyond imagination! Model: 699703 Size: 20x10x10cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Must-have. Conquered the fashion world before launch. Nostalgic Rive Gauche, named after the Paris street Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps. It's simply too fun!
Model: 2020
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
▪️LE 5 À 7▪️
In-stock photo
This year's exploding shoulder bag is finally here from YSL! When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. The inspiration comes from the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", telling the story of the 5-7 PM between work and home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking stiff but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's iconic logo and the new insert buckle design, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Size: 24.5x16x6cm
Model: 2024 Plain
